api: YNAB API v1.85.0 (https://api.ynab.com/v1, OpenAPI description fetched from https://api.ynab.com/papi/open_api_spec.yaml)
scope: Pass B full-surface expansion, re-derived from the live YNAB v1.85.0 OpenAPI description. YNAB renamed its primary resource path from /budgets/{budget_id} to /plans/{plan_id} in v1.79.0 (response keys budgets->plans, budget->plan); the /budgets/{budget_id} paths remain fully functional (undocumented alias, same response shape) and this bundle keeps using them for exact legacy-parity path/response-key compatibility (documented in docs.md). Every documented list-shaped GET resource is now a stream (budgets, accounts, categories, payees, months, transactions, scheduled_transactions); every dialect-expressible mutation (transaction create/update/delete, account/category/payee/scheduled_transaction create, category/month-category/payee update) is a writes.json action. Excluded: single-object detail GETs that duplicate an already-covered list stream's per-item shape, sub-resource list endpoints scoped to one parent id with no bulk cross-parent discovery path, category-group create/update (a container object with no useful standalone read stream), transaction bulk import/multi-create (requires an array-of-transactions body shape the single-record write dialect cannot express), payee locations (GPS-derived convenience data, not core budget data), money movements (a newer aggregate-view resource layered over transactions/transfers, not distinct source data), and the /user endpoint (account identity, not budget business data).

excluded.reason: returns authenticated user account identity only, not budget business data

single-budget full export; identical per-budget summary fields to the budgets list stream's per-item object, plus embedded accounts/categories/payees/transactions already covered by their own dedicated streams
budget display/locale/currency-format settings snapshot, not a syncable business object
single-account detail; identical record shape to the accounts list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
the transactions list narrowed to one account_id; same record shape the transactions stream already covers, filterable client-side by account_id
single-category detail; its parent category group (with nested categories array) is already covered by the categories list stream
the transactions list narrowed to one category_id; same record shape the transactions stream already covers, filterable client-side by category_id

creates a category-group container object with no dedicated read stream of its own (groups are read as the categories stream's group-level records, not a separately syncable resource); narrow admin-organization action, not core budget data sync
renames a category-group container object; same reasoning as category_group creation above, not modeled as its own mutation surface this pass
single-month detail (adds a nested per-month categories array); the months list stream already covers every month-summary field this bundle models
single category-for-month detail; the same budgeted/activity/balance fields are already visible via the categories stream and the update_month_category write's own request shape
GPS coordinates pre-populated from mobile-app payee entry; convenience geolocation metadata, not core budget business data
single payee-location detail; same out-of-scope geolocation data as the payee_locations list
single-payee detail; identical record shape to the payees list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
per-payee GPS location list; same out-of-scope geolocation data as the top-level payee_locations endpoint
the transactions list narrowed to one payee_id; same record shape the transactions stream already covers, filterable client-side by payee_id
a newer grouped-view aggregation layered over existing transactions/transfers, not distinct source data; not yet in wide client use as of this API version
same money-movement aggregate-view resource as money_movement_groups; derived from transactions/transfers already covered by the transactions stream
money_movement_groups narrowed to one month; same excluded aggregate-view resource
money_movements narrowed to one month; same excluded aggregate-view resource
the transactions list narrowed to one month; same record shape the transactions stream already covers, filterable client-side by date
single scheduled-transaction detail; identical record shape to the scheduled_transactions list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream

full-replace update of a scheduled transaction; create_scheduled_transaction already covers the write shape this dialect can express for this resource, and the DELETE+recreate pattern covers replacement
bulk multi-transaction patch over an array body; update_transaction already covers the single-record update shape this dialect can express
triggers YNAB's own linked-account import job (re-pulls transactions from the user's connected bank), not a client-supplied data mutation with a record body
single-transaction detail; identical record shape to the transactions list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
